summary: Tested Multiple Payments Motor Feature. All 10 backend tests pass. Implementation verified: payments array in POST /api/bills/{bill_id}/pay, payments stored in bill document, change_currency and change_amount fields, pre-cuenta multimoneda equivalents (USD/EUR), invoice print with multiple payment breakdown.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Payment methods have exchange_rate (USD=64, EUR=70) ✅
TEST 2: Create order and bill for testing ✅
TEST 3: Pay with single payment method (backward compatibility) ✅
TEST 4: Pay with multiple payment methods (new feature) ✅
TEST 5: change_currency and change_amount stored in bill ✅
TEST 6: Pay with foreign currency (USD) and verify change calculation ✅
TEST 7: Pre-cuenta includes currency equivalents (USD/EUR with rates) ✅
TEST 8: Invoice print shows multiple payments breakdown ✅
critical_code_review_comments: billing.py lines 67-76: PaymentEntry model correctly defines payment_method_id, amount, amount_dop, currency, exchange_rate
billing.py lines 88-93: PayBillInput accepts payments: Optional[List[PaymentEntry]], change_currency, change_amount
billing.py lines 366-406: Multiple payments processing iterates through payments array and stores each with correct exchange_rate
billing.py lines 411-425: update_fields includes payments list, change_currency, change_amount
server.py lines 1941-1999: Invoice print shows 'FORMAS DE PAGO' header when >1 payment, lists each with currency symbol and DOP equivalent
server.py lines 1965-1998: Change logic handles foreign currency - shows recibido in original currency, change always in DOP
server.py lines 2165-2177: Pre-cuenta shows equivalents for all configured foreign currencies with exchange rates

features_verified.payments_stored_in_bill: PASS - Bill document contains payments array with all payment details
features_verified.change_currency_stored: PASS - Bill stores change_currency (default 'DOP') and change_amount
features_verified.exchange_rates_configured: PASS - USD=64, EUR=70 as specified in requirements
features_verified.pre_cuenta_multimoneda: PASS - Shows 'Equiv US$ X.XX (Tasa:64.00)' and 'Equiv € X.XX (Tasa:70.00)'
features_verified.invoice_multiple_payments: PASS - Shows 'FORMAS DE PAGO' header and lists each payment method with amount
features_verified.foreign_currency_change: PASS - When paying in USD/EUR, shows 'Recibido (USD): US$ X.XX' and 'CAMBIO (RD$): RD$ X.XX'
features_verified.backward_compatibility: PASS - Single payment method still works with old API format

implementation_details.print_72mm_format: All templates use 72mm print width (42 chars) with proper padding

seed_data_verified: Created multiple test orders and bills with single and multiple payment methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple payments feature fully functional. PaymentEntry model accepts payment_method_id, amount, amount_dop, currency, exchange_rate. Bills store payments array and change info. Pre-cuenta shows USD/EUR equivalents. Invoice prints all payment methods when >1. Exchange rates: USD=64, EUR=70. Admin PIN: 10000.
